title: Pressure Service Route
notes: Connects D4 Vendor Backroute / Checkpoint Backlot, C5 Transit Drain Market, E5 Custody Convoy Yard, and future D6 Pressure Pipeworks.
Pressure service layer with valve-control booth, pressure valves, pipe cellar, Red utility patrol cage, service office, and hidden rescue marks.
Designed for Astro Van, utility vehicles, Civic Patrol cruisers, and Sable/Deep Lantern route movement.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
